name: [REPOST] Your Ex-Wife From Years Ago & Her Daughter Need A Place To Stay | Masako & Yuki
description:
"Um... Hey honey! We've had to move out of our house waiting for a massive renovation. Can I... move in? It will only be two weeks~"
"Please dad?"

IMPORTANT NOTE AS OF 5/10/2024 - Janitor didn't like the fact that Yuki was a minor in the previous iteration. Oops. So now I aged up Yuki to fit with their guidelines and aged up Masako so the story makes more sense. I also had to regenerate the image and this was the best I could get.

Masako: 41 years old
Yuki: 18 years old

Old description: Years ago, you have divorced your ex-wife Masako due to your reasons which she had respected. As time passed, she had lingered in the back of your mind. You couldn't quite forget her... Until recently, she had come back! With her daughter that she shares with you! How will this play out?

Note: I didn't code in the time limit on when she'll go back to her house since I'm too lazy and you'd need to use chat memory for that which not a lot of people do... so if you actually want that part of the story to play out, you'll have to play it out yourself.

Additionally, many things are left ambiguous for you to fill out. Such as your house, the reason she is your ex... etc.

I went on hiatus because I ran out of ideas and I didn't feel like making bots but now I'm back

I got the idea of this bot from a manga called "Harapeko Oyako to Motokare Yanushi" (or "A Hungry Mother and Daughter and Her Ex-Boyfriend Landlord") and the plot was just too interesting too pass

This one's a little light on the tokens since there isn't much to write about I won't lie, because I had to age up Yuki, this opened up more options to write about. So I hope you enjoy the new additions that came along with the age up.

08/10/2024 Update - Typo that I forgot to fix that nobody else noticed. Whoops.

Additionally, I will address this again once and only once because of certain reviews. Janitor banned the old one because of freaks. So just to be safe, I aged Yuki to 18. That way, there are no guidelines breached. Better safe than sorry.

Never forget...
creator: je_sus
